description_long: This is a weathered wooden canoe with a classic, elongated hull and a slightly pointed bow and stern. The canoe features two visible bench-style seats and a central thwart, all crafted from the same dark, aged wood as the hull. Two wooden oars are positioned on either side, suggesting the canoe is ready for rowing. The surface of the canoe is rough and matte, with visible grain and wear, indicating frequent use or exposure to the elements. The gunwales run along the top edge, reinforcing the structure and providing a handhold. There are no visible registration numbers or carrying handles on the exterior.
description: A weathered wooden canoe with two bench seats, a central thwart, and two oars, featuring a rough, aged finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, two bench seats, central thwart, and both oars extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the canoe's elongated profile, wooden planks, and one oar resting on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stern, both bench seats, central thwart, and the symmetrical placement of the oars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the hull's length, wooden planking, and one oar.
